meaning: Uniform (Universal) Resource Locator 统一（通用）资源定位器
examples: Try this: Take a photo and upload it to Facebook, then after a day or so, note what the URL link to the picture is and then delete it.
This week's comic doodle reportedly only shows in the US, unless you call up a special URL.
In the case of Facebook, the company says data may hang around until the URL in question is reused, which is usually "after a short period of time", though obviously that time can vary considerably.
Or perhaps you want to include only your Facebook page URL or your Twitter address.
Wiggen said he has provided RemoveSlander an URL for an automated takedown script on his site.
